name: Axoflow
description: Security data pipeline platform for collecting, enriching and routing logs and telemetry with OpenTelemetry and syslog-ng.

seo.title: Axoflow — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: Axoflow: Security data pipeline platform for collecting, enriching and routing logs and telemetry with OpenTelemetry and syslog-ng.

when_to_use: Route logs from syslog-ng to Datadog or Splunk via OTel
Enrich security telemetry with threat intelligence fields
Manage OpenTelemetry collectors fleet from one UI
Filter and sample high-volume log streams before ingestion
Bridge legacy syslog infrastructure to modern SIEM

pros: syslog-ng heritage with modern OpenTelemetry support
Reduces SIEM ingest costs via pre-filtering
cons: Narrower scope than Cribl or Vector
Less brand recognition in observability circles
review.verdict: Competent security-focused pipeline, but Cribl dominates the category with more features and mindshare.
review.best_for: Security teams trimming SIEM costs with policy-driven log routing.
review.not_for: General observability teams who already use Vector or Cribl.
